 Metadata JSON format: 

 {

 "Link": "String - valid URI. Optional property. If "File" is missing in request the "Link" property is required. If "File" is present in request the "Link" property is unacceptable.",

  "LanguageId": "Integer. Required property. Internal Icecat language identifier. List of them could be obtained from languages REST API.",

Status.description: Stage of report processing. It will 'Done' if report was sent and it is ready to be downloaded

RowsCount.description: Total quantity of rows in original file

CurrentStageRows.description: Current quantity of processed rows at the current stage of report processing

ReadyFile.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Link to ready coverage report

OriginalFile.description: Link to source file of coverage report

Mismatched.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of rows from original file where was none empty product IDs but product was not found in Icecat database

InvalidRows.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of rows from original file where is empty product IDs

ExistedProducts.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of matched with Icecat product rows from original file

FoundByMpnAndBrand.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. The number of products that were matched by MPN and brand.

FoundByGtin.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. The number of products that were matched by GTIN.

FoundByMpn.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. The number of products that were matched by MPN.

ExistedSponsoredProducts.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of matched with Icecat product rows from original file where Icecat product has sponsored brand

ExistedProductDuplicates.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of matched with Icecat product rows from original file having duplicate in original file by matched icecat productId

ExistedDescribedProducts.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of matched with Icecat product rows from original file where Icecat product is described

ExistedDescribedSponsoredProducts.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of matched with Icecat product rows from original file where Icecat product is described and it has sponsored brand

ExistedActiveProducts.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of matched with Icecat product rows from original file where Icecat product was imported from at least one distributor during last distributors import

MpnVendorDuplicates.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Excluded original rows from 'ReadyFile' as duplicates by original product Ids if setting 'IncludeDuplicates' was set to false

UniqueExistingProducts.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of unique existing products (ExistedProducts - ExistedProductDuplicates)

ExistedProductDuplicates.description: Available only if 'Status' has value 'Done'. Quantity of matched with Icecat product rows from original file having duplicate in original file by matched icecat productId

AddLocalTextCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be 'Y' if description block for this languages exists or 'N' if vice versa

AddMarketingTextCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be 'Y' if marketing text for this languages exists or 'N' if vice versa

AddBulletPointsCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be 'Y' if bullet points for this languages exists or 'N' if vice versa

AddEanCol.description: If matched product has atleast one EAN it will add column with value 'Y' and 'N' otherwise

AddHostedVideoCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be 'Y' if there is MMO for this language with 'video' or 'flash' in content type or 'N' if vice versa

AddLinkedVideoCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be 'Y' if there is MMO for this language stored as external link or 'N' if vice versa

AddPdfCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be 'Y' if there is MMO with one of types 'leaflet','manual pdf','other digital assets' or 'N' if vice versa

AddPicturesNumCol.description: Add column one columns with total number of visible and one with invisible images. Also adds columns with number of images + main image for each language defined in OptionsLangIds

AddReviewCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be # of review for given language

AddFeaturesCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be # of feature values for given language

AddRelationsCol.description: Adds column 'Alternatives' where will be # of product relations with the same category as the product. Adds column 'Relations' where will be # of product relations with category not equal with one of the product

AddCompanyCol.description: Adds column 'Company' with company name of product owner

AddEnergyLabelCol.description: Adds column 'EU Energy Label' if product has at least on MMO with type 'EU Energy Label' there will be 'Y' and 'N' vice versa

AddRtbCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be 'Y' if there is at least one RTB for given language or 'N' if vice versa

Add360Col.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be # of 360 MMO for given language

AddMmoHtmlCol.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be exist status of product story MMO for given language

AddMmoProductStoryV2Col.description: Adds column for each language from OptionsLangIds where will be exist status of product story 2.0 MMO for given language

AddMainImgCol.description: Add column with link to main image of the product

AddMainImgExtendedCol.description: Add 3 columns with width, height and size of product's main image

AddEolCol.description: Adds column with international end of life

AddReleaseDateCol.description: Adds column with international release date

AddCompletenessCol.description: Adds column with completeness score of product

CoverageFromFileId.description: ID of report to be used to get, change or delete the report

post.summary: Send command to import data from the uploaded feed using passed column mapping and import settings.
post.description: Send command to import data from the uploaded feed using passed column mapping and import settings.

Metadata.description:
Task metadata in the JSON format.
```
{
  "PerformCellsDeletion": true (1)
  "IgnoredColumns": [ (2)
    "string"
  ],
  "ColumnMapping": [ (3)
    {
      "OriginalName": "string", (4)
      "MappedName": "string" (5)
    }
  ],
  "Policies": { (6)
    "Gallery": "string" (7)
    "DescriptionBlock": "string" (8)
    "Features": "string" (9)
    "Multimedia": "string" (10)
  },
  "GenerateUpdatedReport": true (11)
  "ExportEmptyFeatures": true (12)
}


Footnotes:
1 - Indicates whether process empty cells (TRUE - assets representing by empty cells will be deleted, FALSE - don't process empty cell)
    Required property
    Type: boolean.
2 - List of column names that must be ignored.
    Required property
    Type: array
    Number of items: 0-2147483647
    Type of items: string
    Unique items: yes
3 - Mapping of column names.
    Required property
    Type: array
    Number of items: 0-2147483647
    Type of items: object
    Unique items: yes
4 - Original name of column.
    Required property
    Type: string
5 - Mapped name of column.
    Required property
    Type: string
    Min length: 1
6 - Policies for processing column values.
    Required property
    Type: object
7 - Policy name for gallery.
    Type: string
    Enum: [ 'KeepMainAndReplaceGallery', 'CreateOrReplace', 'ReplaceAll', 'ReplaceOwn', 'ReplaceOwnAndUpdateImageTypes']
    Default: 'ReplaceAll'
    Number of items: 1-255
    Type of items: string
8 - Policy name for DescriptionBlock.
    Type: string
    Enum: ['CreateOrReplace', 'CreateOrReplaceOwn', 'CreateOrFullFill', 'ReplaceAll' 'ReplaceOwn']
    Default: 'CreateOrReplace'
    Number of items: 1-255
    Type of items: string
9 - Policy name for Features.
    Type: string
    Enum: ['CreateOrReplace', 'CreateOrSkip']
    Default: 'CreateOrReplace'
    Number of items: 1-255
    Type of items: string
10 - Policy name for Multimedia.
    Type: string
    Enum: ['CreateOrReplace', 'CreateOrSkip', 'ReplaceOwn', 'ReplaceAll']
    Default: 'CreateOrReplace'
    Number of items: 1-255
    Type of items: string
11 - Generate updated report.
    Type: boolean
12 - Optional boolean property. TRUE - add features with empty values to reports, FALSE - don't add features with empty values to reports
```
